temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a blue plaid shirt, Chandler, stands in a doorway, looking concerned. He speaks to another man, whose back is to the camera and wearing a pink plaid shirt. The door behind them is numbered 1232. (Storyline: Chandler is trying to convince the other man to go back to the apartment because Monica is upset. He is worried about the consequences of their actions.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Pleading, slightly panicked. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:06) The camera angle reverses, showing the man in the pink shirt, Ross, looking back at Chandler. The text 'DIRECTED BY DAVID SCHWIMMER' is superimposed on the screen as Ross offers to help. (Storyline: Ross, who is also upset, decides to help Chandler search for the missing items, showing their shared concern for Monica's reaction.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Resigned, helpful. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
